system.description: When you **_perform sleight of hand on an unwary mark_**, you succeed and no one's the wiser. If you're being watched, roll +DEX: **on a 10+**, you succeed and no one's the wiser; **_on a 7-9_**, you succeed OR no one's the wiser (your choice).

success.value: You succeed and no one's the wiser.

partial.value: You succeed OR no one's the wiser (your choice).
